title: Scenario C - Source Short-Risk Escalation
subtitle: A high-priority failure mode where safety takes precedence over conceptual scaffolding.
lab_task: Identify and eliminate unsafe low-resistance paths in a basic power circuit.
learning_objective: Recognize why unsafe wiring must be handled before measurement reasoning.
presentation_summary: The system detects an unsafe path across the source, so the teaching flow shifts into immediate containment and correction.
teacher_note: Use this case to emphasize the difference between conceptual mistakes and safety-sensitive mistakes.
